text:
EXPLANATION: The citation refers to a legitimate model repository on Hugging Face, which serves as the official documentation and access point for the Meta Llama 3.2 1B model. The reported author mismatch is a minor metadata parsing issue, as Meta is indeed the creator and owner of the Llama 3.2 models.

LINK: https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B
FOUND_TITLE: Llama-3.2-1B
FOUND_AUTHORS: Meta
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
